reference: I am a registered nurse. I am experiencing severe esophageal, upper abdominal, and chest pain that comes and goes. My blood pressure is good and my heart rate is normal. There are no skips when auscultating my heart. I cannot afford an emergency room trip. I took Pepcid, but it did not help. I know I should go to the emergency room, but I want your opinion.
text: How can you see into my eyes like open doors?
